extra.reason: Scaffolded pnpm/Turborepo monorepo: @motif/shared (Idea/Tier/sync types + Vitest), Capture (Expo, bundles iOS/Android/web), Bridge (Tauri + bridge-core crate + cargo tests). Root pnpm build + typecheck + tests green; cargo check/test green. iOS/Android simulator and Windows/Linux window launches documented (not runnable in this env).
Serverless AWS backend deployed via CDK; all 4 ACs verified end-to-end (ADR 0004, live /health+/me, smoke-test signup/login, empty S3 bucket).

Implemented core record-and-auto-save loop: single record button (tap-toggle), auto-named on-device Idea save, reverse-chronological Library (name+duration). Tested core in @motif/shared (idea/library) + apps/capture/src/core (recording-session); thin Expo shell over expo-audio + expo-file-system.

Library polish: each entry renders a (synthesized) waveform + name + duration, plays on tap (expo-audio player), and supports in-place rename (cross-platform modal) and delete (removes metadata + on-device audio). Pure rename/remove/normalize + waveform in @motif/shared; playback/rename/delete wiring in App.tsx + components. Real waveform deferred to motif-6fu.13.

Share action added to Library entries; hands audio to OS share sheet via expo-sharing (ADR 0001). Pure share-plan seam in src/core/idea-share.ts (Vitest). AC1/AC3 met end-to-end for compressed (AAC) Ideas; AC2 transcode decision implemented, real WAV->AAC encoder deferred to motif-f7w (blocked by motif-6fu.9, no WAV Idea can exist yet). Committed 0617fd8.

Free-tier local-network sync implemented: shared protocol + Capture sync engine + Bridge receiver core (dedup library, pairing rules, copy-semantics accept) with dependency-free std-net HTTP transport (loopback-tested). Thin shells: Bridge Tauri receiver+UI, Capture fetch client + pairing dialog + auto-sync. Follow-ups: motif-6fu.14 (persist pairing), .15 (mDNS discovery), .16 (on-hardware E2E), .17 (code hardening), .18 (background sync).
Implemented Bridge audio preview, native file drag, AAC-to-WAV staging, and unchanged WAV handoff

Implemented Capture sign-up/confirmation/login, secure session storage, anonymous Free behavior, deployed persistent tier API/debug control, and verified with full quality gates plus live auth smoke test.

Implemented immediate tier-derived recording rules and UI: Free/Basic mono AAC only; Pro selectable mono/stereo PCM WAV via a cross-platform native recorder. Added tested cloud-quota decisions for 0GB/25GB/1TB with warning/block messages, ready for cloud relay/offload callers. Full JS/TS build, typecheck, tests, Cargo tests/check pass. Hardware format validation tracked in motif-6fu.19.

Implemented and deployed Basic/Pro cloud relay sync: Capture uploads through authenticated presigned S3 URLs, Bridge account sessions poll/import through bridge-core, local-network sync remains additive for all tiers, and backend rejects Free. Tests and live AWS relay smoke pass. Committed 050d369.

Implemented explicit paid-tier Offload and redownload actions in Capture. Offload verifies cloud storage before deleting local audio; redownload restores the expected local file and playback state. Added tested tier gating and Library storage-state transitions; full JS/TS and Rust quality gates pass.

Implemented and verified paid account multi-device convergence: multiple Capture device offers share one account-scoped relay manifest and import into one Bridge Library; account isolation and unchanged Free relay rejection are covered. Tests and typecheck pass.
Implemented real audio preview extraction, device-local waveform sidecars, Library rendering, fallback behavior, and tests.
Persisted Bridge identity, pairing code, and paired Capture across restarts with receiver tests
Implemented Bridge DNS-SD advertisement and native Capture Bonjour discovery; pairing now requires only the code.
Implemented pairing attempt lockout, expiring code rotation, and surfaced pairing security state in Bridge.
Implemented and validated best-effort OS-scheduled background sync for pending Capture Ideas.
